input.question: What is the average reported workload hours for each course?

payload.question: What is the average reported workload hours for each course?

output.sql:
SELECT
  course_id AS course_id,
  course_name AS course_name,
  AVG(reported_workload_hours) AS avg_workload_hours
FROM course_reviews
GROUP BY course_id, course_name
ORDER BY avg_workload_hours DESC;

visualization.title: Average Reported Workload Hours by Course

payload.sql:
SELECT
  course_id AS course_id,
  course_name AS course_name,
  AVG(reported_workload_hours) AS avg_workload_hours
FROM course_reviews
GROUP BY course_id, course_name
ORDER BY avg_workload_hours DESC;
